title: Web Shooter
description: This mod adds a Web shooter, that actually works and that you can swing from, like Spiderman!
body:
## Web Shooter
### What is this mod?
This is a _mod_ that adds **1 thing.** An item _called_ the **Web Shooter.** With it you can **right click** to fire a web from your **_right_** hand and **left click** to fire a web from your **_left_** hand. These **attaches** to _blocks_ and _surfaces_ and then you can **swing** with them.

### Crafting recipe
You craft a **Web Shooter** with this **_recepie_**:
![Crafting recepie for the Web Shooter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fbb345391ae4254f390834f6804a8eb3e57b8f1.png)

### Why use it?
This mod is _not really_ a **_serious_** mod. It is **not** meant to _improve_ the functionality or _optimize_ the game in **_any_** way. **But** it is a mod for you to **have fun** with. Its a mod that brings more **fun ways** to _transport_ and _move around_ your **minecraft world.**
